creator: ssanders@opnet.com
text:
The program whose hs_err file is a message passing process.  It accepts tcp connections, listens on the concections, and re-distributes messages to the connections as necessary.

It appears that on a random interval, the JVM will drop core.   The core files look to be scrambled.  The cores show 51 threads in the accept() call where the parameters to accept() for all 51 threads are the same.
